hero.headline: Podcasts, audiobooks and voiceovers with guidance, dramaturgy and quality.

about.headline: From idea to finished content. In one place.
about.body1: Alwaysfriday.live is a curated studio for audio and video content with long-term value.
about.body2: Our approach is based on focus, calm environment and thoughtful guidance. Every project is treated with attention and care.

services.headline: Services
services.quote: We guide the creative process from concept and dramaturgy through recording and post‑production.
services.quoteBody: Our studio offers a rare combination of professional infrastructure and a unique setting — whether for a few hours or several focused days.

approach.headline: Approach
approach.ideaDesc: We help shape your idea and format.
approach.productionDesc: Audio & video recording in our studio.

model.subtitle: Creative Subscription
model.whatIsSessionContent: A session is a production block during which multiple outputs are created at once. You come in once and leave with content ready for weeks ahead.
model.whatIsSessionCombine: Within a single session we can combine:
model.whatIsSessionResult: A single session produces content for multiple channels and formats — long-form video, audio versions and short-form content for social media.
model.whatIsSessionGuarantee: AlwaysFriday handles dramaturgy, production and technical execution, so everything maintains quality and clear direction.
model.howSubscriptionIntro: It doesn’t matter where you start. You get access to the entire AlwaysFriday ecosystem.
model.howSubscriptionProblem: Most vendors operate separately — an agency handles design, a studio handles production, an event team handles events. Each on their own, with their own brief and no shared context.
model.howSubscriptionSystem: AlwaysFriday connects Studio, Live and Space into one system where we share the team, strategy and way of working.
model.howSubscriptionExamples: Starting with a podcast? We’ll help with visual identity. Starting with a rebrand? We’ll follow up with content and production. Planning an event? We’ll connect it with your brand and social media outputs.
model.howSubscriptionConclusion: Instead of three different partners, you have one team that keeps everything together — visually, content-wise and production-wise. No unnecessary briefings, no handoffs between agencies, no wasted time.
model.whySubscriptionIntro: Content only works when it’s regular, consistent and strategically connected. The subscription model is the answer to how to guarantee that.
model.whyConsistencyDesc: Audiences get used to a rhythm and algorithms reward it. Content published regularly grows differently than a series of one-off outputs.
model.whyDepthDesc: The longer a studio knows a client, the more precisely it works with their voice, audience and intent. Each session builds on the previous one.
model.whyFlexibilityDesc: Capacity can be shifted to where it’s needed — recording, design or strategy, depending on the client’s current phase.
model.whyClarityDesc: The client pays a predictable amount and receives a predictable output. Clear terms from day one.
model.sessionDesc: You’re starting to build content and need a functional foundation.
model.sessionStudioItem1Sub: Lower thirds, subtitles, thumbnail templates, cover art
model.quote: Every content requires a different approach and scope. We’re happy to meet you in person and look at your project individually.

contact.thankYou: Thank you. We'll get back to you soon.
